name: Entropy Architects
short_description: "With each layer's laws collapsing, every decision reforges the world!" Will you become a desperate gambler, or emerge as a calculating tactician? Every choice remolds your fate – and sometimes, you'll need a dash of luck to tip the scales. Forge your ultimate build and conquer the impossible!
detailed_description:
《Entropy Architects》 is a strategic roguelike game that utilizes a variety of set effects and legendary affixes to create unimaginable spell effects. With ultra-high freedom in builds, you can break through limits. Your operational decisions will influence the height of your tower climb.

Game Features:

  • Combination of Sets and Legendary Affixes:
    The combination of legendary affixes with sets will produce magical chemical reactions. When you construct a unique effect, your skills will undergo a qualitative transformation.
    How you make reasonable choices during the process will determine the height of your climb. The upper limit of your build will always depend on your decisions.

  • Relics:
    Relics can generally be categorized into operational and combat power types, and the choice of relics is limited.
    Therefore, how you manage your operations will be another layer of strategic decision-making, with a bit of luck involved. Among the limited relic choices, will you prioritize operations or immediate combat power?

  • Class-Specific Loot Pools:
    Each class will have its own loot pool, featuring 3 class-specific sets and 5 or more universal sets. These sets enhance your capabilities across three dimensions: survival, damage, and support.

supported_languages: English, French, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
